summary: PWA Transformation & Mobile Responsiveness Testing Complete. All features verified via code review and Playwright tests. PWA files (manifest.json, service-worker.js, icons) accessible. Login page renders correctly at both desktop (1920px) and mobile (375px) viewports with no horizontal overflow. Auth error banner displays at /login?error=not_authorized. Code review confirms: MobileTabBar component with 4 tabs (data-testid: tab-dashboard, tab-leads, tab-quotes, tab-more), desktop Sidebar with hidden lg:flex class, LeadDetail mobile sticky footer with 3 buttons, min-h-[48px] on form buttons, and pb-16 content padding.

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All PWA and mobile responsiveness features verified

mobile_tab_bar.visibility_class: lg:hidden (visible on mobile, hidden on desktop)

desktop_sidebar.visibility_class: hidden lg:flex (hidden on mobile, visible on desktop)

content_padding.purpose: Prevents tab bar overlap on mobile

login_page_tests.desktop_1920px: PASS - Login page loads, Google button visible, no overflow
login_page_tests.mobile_375px: PASS - Login page loads, Global Clean Home branding visible, no overflow

context_for_next_testing_agent: PWA and mobile responsiveness fully tested. Cannot test authenticated pages (mobile tab bar, sidebar, LeadDetail) without Google OAuth login. Code structure verified via grep: MobileTabBar in App.js has correct data-testids, Sidebar.js has hidden lg:flex, LeadDetail.js has mobile-lead-actions footer. All form buttons have min-h-[48px]. Service worker caches /, /dashboard, /leads, /quotes, /index.html.

limitations.authenticated_pages_not_visually_tested: Google OAuth required - verified via code review instead
limitations.service_worker_registration: Cannot verify runtime registration without auth
